tasks.title: T01 — Schema + types cleanup. Drop `JudgmentCallSchema`, `JudgmentCallCategorySchema`, `JudgmentCall`, `JudgmentCallCategory`, `ThresholdTierSchema`, `ThresholdTier` from `plugin/src/types/investment.ts`. Slim `InvestmentReportSchema` (drop `threshold_tier` field). Update `plugin/src/types/index.ts` re-exports. Drop `judgment_calls` and `batch_surfaced_at` declared optional fields from `plugin/src/types/changes.ts` (keep `.passthrough()` for archived backward-compat). Drop matching tests in `plugin/src/types.test.ts`. RED: add 2 regression tests that load archived bundles carrying `judgment_calls: []` and `batch_surfaced_at: <ISO>` and assert they parse + round-trip cleanly via passthrough. GREEN: implement schema cleanup so red tests pass. TDD inline.

tasks.title: T02 — Tool slimming + reflection co-removal. In `plugin/src/tools/investment.ts`: drop `classifyTier`, `DEFAULT_THRESHOLDS`, `ThresholdsSchema`, `Thresholds` type. Slim `adv_investment_report` tool: drop `thresholds` arg, drop `threshold_tier` from output. Keep `computePerGateDurations` (pure formatter, exported for reflection). In `plugin/src/tools/investment.test.ts`: drop tier-related tests. In `plugin/src/tools/reflection.ts`: drop `classifyTier` import (line 17), drop `classifyTier` call (line 353), drop `threshold_tier` from emitted reflection report (line 536). In `plugin/src/storage/reflection.ts`: drop `threshold_tier` from `ReflectionEntry.plane1.efficiency` schema (line 39); confirm `.passthrough()` at line 119 covers archived reflection records. In `plugin/src/tools/reflection.test.ts`: update assertion at line 152 to drop `threshold_tier` expectation. RED: add regression test confirming archived `reflections.jsonl` entry carrying `threshold_tier: 'auto'` parses + round-trips cleanly via passthrough. GREEN: implement co-removal so all reflection.test.ts and investment.test.ts cases pass. TDD inline. Blocked by T01 (depends on slimmed InvestmentReportSchema).

tasks.title: T03 — Storage cleanup. In `plugin/src/storage/store-temporal/changes.ts`: drop `judgment_calls` and `batch_surfaced_at` from projection passthroughs at lines 123-124 and 169-170. The full `Change` schema's `.passthrough()` covers archived reads. In `plugin/src/storage/store-disk.ts:370`: drop `judgment_calls: []` initializer in new-change creation. In `plugin/src/storage/change-selection.ts:160-161`: drop `batch_surfaced_at` from `getLastActivityTimestamp` formula (other timestamps cover the recency case). In `plugin/src/index.ts:734`: drop comment referencing Phase 1.5. RED: add tests asserting (a) new changes don't get `judgment_calls` initialized, (b) `getLastActivityTimestamp` returns correct results without `batch_surfaced_at` input, (c) projections from store-temporal don't surface the dropped fields on new changes. GREEN: implement cleanup so red tests pass. TDD inline. Blocked by T01.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery findings: (1) gating Q1 verified FULLY COVERED via 5-archive sample (addagentmeshandinrepoarchive 8 KDs, fixWorkflowReplayDeterminism 7 KDs, mechanical changes 0 KDs all consistent with rq-autonomy01.3 structural pause path); (2) Q2-Q5 resolved by LBP defaults; (3) zero non-ADV consumers; (4) backward-compat preserved via .passthrough() on Change schema. Agreement persisted.
